title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 262.613 - Secretary, duties, report — records open
text:
262.613.  Secretary, duties, report — records open. — The secretary of the council shall record the proceedings of all meetings of the council and of the officers of the council in books provided for that purpose; prepare and submit to each annual meeting of the council a report on the work and activities of the council since the last annual meeting; and perform such other duties as are usually performed by secretaries and as may be prescribed by the council.
(L. 1961 p. 7 § 20)
